sharedPost.text:
Wow 😮 Amazing talent! ❤️❤️ 😮 The Shen Yun dancers performing under the California sun is so beautiful.
⚡️ Trust me — you'll want to see it live. Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/gSQBne for theater and ticket information

items.text:
Røget honning BBQ bøfpasta i én gryde
Ingredienser:
● 450 g flanksteak eller mørbrad, tyndt skåret
● 2 spsk olivenolie
● 1 spsk røget paprika
● 1 tsk hvidløgspulver
● 1 tsk løgpulver

items.text:
Casting Call – San Diego (Paid Shoot)
We’re casting for a home service business commercial shooting in San Diego on the 18th and 19th.

Looking for:

 • Men and women

 • Ages 30–60+

 • Must be natural and comfortable on camera

This is not for actors who feel scripted or stiff — we need real, relatable people who can speak and behave naturally on camera.

To apply:

Text 858-753-5927 with:

 • A short video of you on camera (talking naturally)

 • Any past work or reel (if you have it)

 • Your name + age

If you’re not comfortable being yourself on camera, please don’t apply.

items.text:
# **The industry isn't dying, it’s just changing.**

The 'old way' of finding work in film and creative media is fading, and it’s leaving a lot of talented people in the dark. It’s hard to have an **entrepreneurial mindset** when you were trained to follow a traditional path, but right now,*** collaboration is our greatest currency.***

I started a community specifically to support individuals who still want to make a career out of their creative skills. It’s time to find the people you **actually want to work with** and create your own opportunities. I run a space for creators who are shifting from 'job seekers' to '**opportunity makers'.**

If you’re willing to put in the work but just need the right community to back you up,** drop a comment. **Let’s stop waiting on the studios.

Hi everyone!
My name is Ramin. I’m Uk-based  Director & Cinematographer.

Here’s a collection of my works called “Fragments of Light”.

If you Looking for Director & Videographer,a music video or cinematic content or filmmaking ?

I Working with:

– Artists

– Musicians

– Creators

– Filmmakers

Let’s bring the visions to life.

DM me to start 🎥

‼️ WARSZAWA 10  KWIETNIA EPIZOD ‼️
RUSZAMY Z KOLEJNYM, TRZECIM SEZONEM, KULTOWEGO SERIALU, KTÓREGO AKCJA DZIEJE SIE W LATACH 40. 

W związku z powyższym, poszukujemy:

▪️ DO EPIZODU mężczyzny jako kormorana

Jest to epizod bez tekstu, będzie do odegrania scenka aktorska. 

Zbiórka w godzinach porannych na Chełmskiej. 

Stawka 220zł gotówka po planie. 

 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami- SYLWETKA, TWARZ PRZÓD I BOK, WZROST, WYMIARY przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując „EPIZOD”.

**Szukam modelki na zasadzie TFP Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk ) ‘’Sensualny mrok**

** **

**Bez doświadczenia w wieku 25 – 45 lat**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator. Tematem sesji będzie sensualny mrok

 

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
Warszawa / okolice | kampania społeczna health/family

Zdjęcia: Warszawa / okolice

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy pomiędzy 14 a 16.04, z naciskiem na 14.04

Sceny są krótkie, a kwestie mówione, jeśli są, to 1–2 zdaniowe.

Szukamy Kobiet w wieku 60-65 lat z widoczną energią życiową i sprawnością fizyczną. Uśmiech mile widziany! 

Prosimy o przesyłanie zgłoszenia zawierające:

• aktualne zdjęcia

• wiek

• miejsca zamieszkania

• wzrostu oraz wymiarów / rozmiaru ubrań

• numeru telefonu

• link do showreela lub opcjonalnie krótkiego video / self tape

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać z dopisaniem roli na: karina.szymocha@chillgroup.pl, z dopiskiem: CASTING, SENIORKA 

Zlecenie płatne. 

Na zgłoszenia czekam do jutra do godziny 12:00, do zobaczenia!

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
Casting Call for Blackburn College film project (6-minute post-apocalyptic, rom-com short film) 'Big Mistake'

I will be casting for the characters of Mallory (18-30 year old female) and Sam (18-30 year old male) please let me know if there would be anyone interested.

Synopsis: Sam and Mal fall in love surviving chaos together. But moving in together turns their romance into a nonstop, absurd battle of bickering, with fights escalating over everything. So, when a zombie crashes through their front door, will they finally team up, or keep fighting each other?

Filming would take place in Blackburn around Griffin Park for 2/3 days between the 15th and the 26th of April! Please message for more info if you are interested in the role and I can share more about the characters and script.

This project is a college film so is non-profit, although we can discuss covering costs for transportation if needed.

topComments.text: I’m interested! I’m not far from Blackburn, this sounds like a right laugh. Unable to dm you, so feel free to dm me with more info
Hi there, I'm also interested. Will you able to dm me? I tried to reach out out but wasn't able to. Thanks.

items.text:
🔥⚡ VENDOR FLASH SALE — LIMITED TIME! ⚡🔥

🤠 The GA Country Summer Festival 2026 is calling ALL vendors — and for a limited time, you can lock in your booth for just $75.

📅 Sunday, May 10th, 2026  
📍 The Colonnade • Ringgold, GA  
🕛 Vendor Hours: 12PM–9PM  

That’s a full day to sell, connect, and maximize your visibility in a high-energy festival atmosphere built around music, community, and family fun.

🎤 Featuring a celebrity guest performance by Tae Lewis from The Voice

We are open to all vendor categories, including:  
✅ Food Vendors  
✅ Retail & Crafts  
✅ Products, Services & More  

💥 This is more than a vendor space — it’s an opportunity to put your business in front of a live crowd, gain new customers, and be part of something BIG.

⏰ Limited spots available — first come, first served. Once they’re gone, they’re gone.

👇 3 EASY WAYS TO REGISTER 👇  

📲 Call or Text: 770-755-3987  
👉 Ask for Karah or Chad VanHoose  

📱 Scan the QR Code on the flyer  

🔗 Register online:  
https://www.eventeny.com/events/ga-country-summer-festival-23734/

🎶 Good music. Great vibes. YOUR booth. Let’s make it happen.

#GACountrySummerFestival #VendorFlashSale #Ringgold #Georgia #CountryFestival #VendorOpportunity #SmallBusiness #FoodVendor #CraftVendor #PopUpShop #SupportLocal #XtremeDreamsFoundation

items.text: Hello! I'm looking for someone to tech for a fantastic one-woman show in central London on 30th May. It will be very simple light and sound but great experience for people who might want to tech for the fringe. Expenses paid within London. Please spread the word and DM if you're interested! 🩷

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m Baz, I work for popiin. 
We’re seeking an outgoing female (25-30) actress in London to star in a promo shoot exploring London’s nightlife. 
This project captures the real experience - fun, chaotic, and controversial moments that define nights out in the city.
If you’re interested, feel free to DM me and I’ll share all the details (location, time and fee) privately. Cheers!

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA i okolice**

**Plan zdjęciowy w JESTED,** **CZECHY**

**Transport z Jeleniej Góry i Szklarskiej Poręby do JESTED **

**14 i/lub 15 kwietnia**

Szukam Statystów, **mężczyzn ok.18-50 lat **na plan biograficznego filmu fabularnego o znanym Polaku pod roboczym tytułem "Kosmonauta".

Panowie w charakterze TECHNIKÓW / WOJSKOWYCH - wiek ok. 20-50 lat.

Można zgłosić się również na 1 z podanych dni.

Przed zdjęciami, prawdopodobnie 13 kwietnia – strzyżenie panów jeśli będzie taka potrzeba - to do potwierdzenia jeszcze.

**Stawka: 140 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + jednorazowo 60 zł dodatkowo za charakteryzację czyli strzyżenie o ile w innym dniu zdjęciowym niż plan**

**Ponieważ gramy lata 70te mamy wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką, wygolone boki i kark

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko. 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JCZ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu + aktualne ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do NOWEGO 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie!
9 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Laura Gasik (28) – Ofiara. Fryzjerka. Miła, spokojna dziewczyna. Samotna. Prowadzi ustabilizowany styl życia. Ubiera się ze smakiem, bez krzykliwości.  Powinna umieć zagrać „zabijaną”. Występuje w 1 scenie + 3 zwłoki (1, 3 (zwłoki), 12 (zwłoki), 13 (zwłoki))

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 17.04 i 23.04

Stawka: 1000zł na rękę 

2. Robert Dębowski (44) – Sprawca. Postawny facet. Właściciel zakładu fryzjerskiego. Facet w średnim wieku, modnie ubrany, ale bez pretensjonalności. Wyraża się prostym, ale poprawnym językiem. Występuje w 4 scenach + 1 OFF (1, 2, 22-OFF, 23, 24) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 23.04

Stawka: 700zł na rękę 

3. Tomasz Karpiński (22) – drobny złodziejaszek. Facet już miał konflikt z prawem. Bezczelny i pewny siebie. Ubiera się w sportowe rzeczy. Język raczej rynsztokowy (12+).  Występuje w 3 scenach (5, 6, 7) 

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 23.04 i 24.04

Stawka: 1000zł na rękę 

4. Joanna Markowska (50) – matka Sandry. Kobieta w średnim wieku, przejmująca się sprawami własnej córki. Będzie występować tylko w domu, więc ubrana w domowe ubranie. Występuje w 2 scenach (9, 10) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 23.04

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

5. Sandra (25) – młoda, atrakcyjna fryzjerka. Przestraszona, załamana śmiercią koleżanki i zmuszona sytuacją do milczenia. Ubiera się modnie. Sporą wagę przywiązuje do wyglądu, ale widz widzi ją płaczącą. Używa prostego, komunikatywnego języka. Występuje w 2 scenach (9, 20) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 23.04

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

6. Elżbieta Gasik (55) – matka Laury. Generalnie silna kobieta, ale w kontekście naszego odcinka – załamana śmiercią córki (wini siebie za jej śmierć). Ubrana jak w delegację służbową (sceny 12 i 13) oraz w dobrej jakości ubrania domowe (scena 21). Posługuje się dobrą polszczyzną. Występuje w 3scenach (12, 12A, 21) 

Terminy: 3 dni zdjęciowe 17.04, 23.04 i 24.04

Stawka: 1500zł na rękę 

7. Kacper Maliński (40) – prezes stowarzyszenia osób poszkodowanych przez czyścicieli kamienic. Prawnik. Posługuje się dobrą, niemal wykwintną polszczyzną. Ubiera się w jeansy i sztruksowe marynarki. Robi dobre wrażenie. Występuje w 1 scenie (14) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 24.04

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

8. Stanisław Kowalec (40) – w odcinku występuje jako Stan. Czyściciel kamienic. Bezwzględny przestępca w średnim wieku, typ „mafioza średniego szczebla”. Pewny siebie i bezczelny. Ubrany w jeansy i skórzaną kurtkę. Występuje w 3 scenach (17, 18, 19) 

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 24.04 i 25.04

Stawka: 1200zł na rękę 

 

9. Młody (30)  – kierowca i ochroniarz Stana. Młody, aspirujący bandziorek. Ubrany na sportowo. Przypakowany.  Występuje w 2 scenach (17, 18)– MUSI MIEĆ PRAWO JAZDY

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 24.04

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:

* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube

* aktualne zdjęcie

* wiek, wzrost, wagę

* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 

* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Casting Liverpool
Still open for applicants for this one-act going on at The Royal Court Studio, LIVERPOOL, 5th and/or 6th June

Margo Jones (38 - 55) Nurse - Lenny’s girlfriend (Fem)

Lenny Woods (33 - 50) Warehouse manager - Margo’s boyfriend (Male)

Glass (40+) Detective (either gender)

A moment between fourteen-year-old Jasmine and step-dad Lenny triggers a flashback in mum Margo and old ghosts reappear. 

When Margo discovers Jasmines bed still made from the day before, the two are distraught.

Is Margo’s suspicion an overreaction? Is Lenny as innocent as he proclaims?

Enter detective John Glass whose job it is to get to the bottom of Jasmine’s disappearance. All may not be as it seems.

This is a profit share (Real one, not "oh we've got no money to pay" type). In the past, we've all got around £50 for it - more if we do the two nights.

sharedPost.text:
-Du singst gerne ?
-Du hast Lust, es besser zu können?
-Du möchtest in einen Chor, um gemeinsam mit anderen zu musizieren, traust es Dir aber bislang nicht zu?
-Du hast andere Beweggründe, Dich intensiver mit deiner Stimme zu befassen?

Dann melde Dich!

Ich zeige Dir, wie man eine solide Atem-/Stimmtechnik erarbeitet, wie Du beim Sprechen und Singen mehr Selbstvertrauen gewinnst und gebe Dir peu à peu das Grundwerkzeug an die Hand, Dich stimmlich wohler zu fühlen.

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Eure/ Ihre
Annette Kuhn

items.text: "New Alpha Becoming" is a campaign about deconstructing the idea of men and masculinity. In its center is our protagonist (80 y. o.) and other men in all ages. For this pro bono campaign we are urgently looking for an enthusiastic cellist for our shoot in Berlin. 8. 4. & 10.4. to play during an interview of the protagonist. Apply via pm

items.text:
Looking for strong, intentional performers for a cinematic short film SoCal area
I’m casting:

— THE MYSTERY MAN (Antagonist)

— THE CAPTURED MAN (Lead)

— HENCHMEN (2)

This is a performance-driven project focused on presence, tension, and visual storytelling. Looking for actors who can bring depth, control, and authenticity to the screen.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPzBPEl-aXySCqn5cB0yRcU0VB1GO85LhcBho1bD6HYHOrKw/viewform

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL THE CAPTURED MAN Role Type: Lead Age Range: 25 30 Ethnicity: Black Character Descrip Description A man thrown into violent situation he doesn't belong in. When we meet him, he is bruised, bloodied, and terrified pleading for his life. Requirements Strong emotional range (fear, panic, confusion, determination) Ability to carry intense, dialogue- heavy scenes Expressive facial reactions and physical storytelling Must convincingly portray exhaustion, injury, and sur vival Physical/Styl Requirement Must be comfortable wearing bloody makeup and prosthetics Submission Requirements: Headshot+ recent photos Height and basic stats Acting or clips available) Contact information'

May be a graphic of text that says 'Directed by Jayda Chippie Carcamo SHORT FILM CASTING CALL THEMYSTERYMAN Role BoleType:Antagonist/Authorityilgur ype:Antagonist Authority Figure Age Range: 25-30 Ethnicity: Black ကမ်မ CharacterDescription: Calm, controlled, and deeply unsettling. Performance requirements: Strong, commanding presence minimal movement Ability to convey through stillness subtle expression Controlled, grounded vocalo vocal delivery West demeanor or accent Has Physical/StylslicRequirement Must be willing to wear bottom grill or visible top tooth detail Headshot+ recent photos Height and basic stats Acting reel clips available) Contacti information INNPYROTE 2000332'

May be an image of text that says 'Foran Upcomingproduction by Jayda Chippie Carcamo Casting Call Looking for 2 Males -Must be the same exact height twins individuals of identical height/build height/ Strong physical awareness and ability to perform slow, precise movements Comfortable performing full costume black wardrobe, ski masks) Silent, and controlled Move with purpose minimal but impactful -Almost mechanical ori sync with one another •Filming will require coordination timing between both performers dialogue; performance entirely physical ·Height must Hoight/mustmatch.arhtrrpn match partner applying as pair) ·Recentphotos -Recent photos Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com'

items.text: Min bedstemor kunne ikke gå, fordi hendes fødder var meget hævede på grund af dårlig blodcirkulation, men jeg lavede denne hjemmelavede opskrift til hende, og nu kan hun gå og hoppe, fordi hun formåede at eliminere den dårlige blodcirkulation, diabetes og fedtophobningen i sin lever.

Ihre Hochzeit – Einzigartig. Elegant. Unvergesslich. ✨

Sie suchen das Besondere für Ihren großen Tag? Jemanden, der Professionalität mit echter Leidenschaft verbindet?

Egal ob Sie eine emotionale Begleitung durch eine Sängerin, einen souveränen Master of Ceremony oder einen mitreißenden Special Act suchen – ich biete Ihnen themenbezogene Eleganz und ein Programm mit Herz.

Warum ich der richtige Partner an Ihrer Seite bin?

Weil ich Ihre Feier aus jeder Perspektive verstehe. Seit über 30 Jahren bin ich als gelernter Eventmanager, Gastronom und Künstler auf kleinen und großen Festen zu Hause. Diese einzigartige Kombination garantiert Ihnen Kompetenz, Empathie und einen unvergesslichen Ablauf.

✉️ Bereit für ein Fest der Extraklasse? 

Kontaktieren Sie mich jetzt für einen Termin zum kostenloses Vorgespräch! Ich freue mich auf Ihre Nachricht.

📧 office-leipzig@web.de
☎️ 034202 154910

#hochzeitssängerin #masterofceremony #hochzeit2026 #eventprofi #specialact #mathiasmariekaiser

items.text:
🎬 Kreative in Dortmund/Bochum gesucht!
Hey zusammen,

ich baue aktuell ein kleines, Content-Team Schauspieler*innen im Raum Dortmund/Bochum auf. Ziel ist es, wöchentlich cinematischen, hochwertigen Content zu produzieren und uns langfristig gemeinsam weiterzuentwickeln.

Ich bin aufstrebender Schauspieler und habe bereits konkrete Ideen sowie eine klare Vision für den Content (cinematisch, relatable, im Filmstil).

Wenn du Leidenschaft für Content Creation hast und Teil von etwas Konsequentem und Ernsthaftem sein möchtest, melde dich gerne bei mir!

items.text:
Heya
Just wanted to introduce myself. I’m based between Brighton and London, and have had a strong passion for creation and expression.  I have a strong interest in projects that lean into more depth and emotion. 

I’m always happy and open to collaborate and get involved wherever I can, whether that’s on screen, or supporting the wider creative process. I appreciate being a part of projects that aim to create something a little different.

Looking forward to connecting with you all and seeing what’s we could work on!

items.text:
CASTING FOR A SURREALIST DRAMA SHORT FILM!!

DATES: 24th-26th APRIL

ROLE: April (Female, playing age 25-30, black): 

Our protagonist's sister, April acted as a sort of parental figure, "the brave one", to Aria throughout their childhood growing up with neglectful parents. They have shared trauma that has cemented their bond - they were not only sisters but best friends. 

LOGLINE: What begins as a normal conversation on an ordinary day takes an unexpected turn, leaving Aria lost in a world of her own and forced to confront the reality she has been avoiding since a recent tragedy. 

Unpaid, food & travel covered. 

Please email halfcoatproductions@gmail.com with spotlight/showreel!

topComments.text: I'm guessing the location is London because people in London don't tend to know there's a whole world out here!

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 15/2026

DER GEWINNER DES GOLDEN BÄREN 2026 UND HOMMAGE AN EINEN WELTSTAR

Blockbustertechnisch läuft mit der Horrorkomödie READY OR NOT 2 ein Leckerbissen für alle Genrefans an.

Eine feinfühlige Künstlerbiografie präsentiert das Cinema Paradiso in St Pölten mit ITS ALL OVER NOW, JEFF BUCKLEY sowie haben wir den Gewinner der Berlinale im Programm, GELBE BRIEFE.

Sie ist vor allem für ihre Rollen bekannt, reife, empathische und oft elegante Frauencharaktere darzustellen. Wir konnten mit Jasmin Ebraheim über Ihre Arbeit ein ausführliches Gespräch führen. 

In Punkto Musik lassen wir uns inspirieren mit Musik aus Kinofilmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 8.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
🎬 Between the Lines
Hi all,
We’re officially around one month out from principal photography on Between the Lines, short film and the first step toward a full feature-length project.

Between the Lines is a romantic drama that follows Ava Conway, a quietly formidable writer, and Reid Harper, a former teen star navigating a changing career, two creatives forced to work together on a project neither of them believes in, only to find themselves living out the very romance they’ve tried so hard to avoid.

At its heart, Between the Lines is about authenticity, vulnerability, and breaking free from the roles we’re expected to play; both on screen and within the industry itself.

As a Northern-led production, we’re deeply committed to:
• Championing Northern voices
• Creating opportunities for regional talent
• Challenging typecasting and industry expectations
• Building a collaborative, inclusive creative environment

This is an incredibly exciting stage for the project, and we’re currently raising funds to ensure we can pay all cast and crew fairly and bring this story to life in a way that reflects the values behind it.

If you’d like to be part of Between the Lines, whether by supporting, sharing, or simply following the journey, we’d love to have you involved.

You can explore the different donation options and learn more via our crowdfunder:

🎬 https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/mnMvqOry?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink

Every contribution, big or small, helps! 💞
items.previewDescription: Raising funds to produce a proof of concept for feature film ‘Between the Lines’, an upcoming romance following the lives of Ava and Reid.

items.text:
A DRAG-COMEDY-LIPSYNC MUSICAL COMING TO SHEFFIELD 2027!
A new stage production is premiering in 2027 in Sheffield at CROOKES SOCIAL CLUB to an audience of 250 people.

Blending acting, dance, and immersive theatre, this dark-comedy-drag show explores heartbreak and transformation with sharp wit and expert storytelling.

We’re looking for a male performer for our Main male Lead who must be 18 years old by April 2026. 

This is for the role of JACQUES who is the Queens right hand man and is secretly in love with here! 

Ideally you are confident actors with an open mind to dance, and comfortable with kissing scenes with another man. However no experience in dance is needed but is preferred with acting.

Rehearsals will be every two weeks, with one rehearsal at the venue in Sheffield every month!

Please fill out the document below, or please contact bookconniedom@gmail.com for further details! ☺️

The role is unpaid but happy to help with travel costs where possible.

items.text:
**Looking for 1st Assistant Director (1st AD) – Short Film "Silent Resilience"**

Hi everyone! I’m currently looking for an **experienced 1st AD** to join our upcoming narrative short film.

This is a **festival-driven project** focusing on social realism, with plans for international festival submissions (including Berlinale).

📍 **Location:** Toronto (North York Civic Centre + Downtown)
📅 **Shoot Dates:** April 18–20, 2026

🔹 About the Film

"Silent Resilience" tells the story of a Chinese immigrant woman fighting for unpaid wages in a system that refuses to respond.
The film explores themes of **labour injustice, silence, and dignity**, with a grounded, realistic visual style.

🔹 What We’re Looking For

• Prior experience as a **1st AD on narrative films (shorts or features)**
• Strong understanding of on-set workflow, scheduling & crew coordination
• Comfortable working in a **fast-paced, low-budget indie environment**
• Strong communication skills (English required, Mandarin is a plus)
• Experience with **festival-level or professional sets preferred**

🔹 Responsibilities

• Run the set and maintain shooting schedule
• Coordinate between director, DP, cast & crew
• Assist with script breakdown & call sheets
• Manage background actors (large protest scene)

🔹 Compensation

• Paid (low-budget indie rate, based on experience)
• IMDb credit
• Opportunity to collaborate on a **festival-level project**

📩 **To apply, please DM me or email:**
**zoeyfilm77@gmail.com**

Please include:
• Your experience / resume
• Previous work (if available)

🙏 Feel free to share or tag someone who might be a good fit. Thank you!

items.text:
# **🎬 MISTRZ OŚWIETLENIA POSZUKIWANY  **

**📍 Warszawa | 21 i 23 kwietnia | zdjęcia nocne  **

Hej!

Do realizacji krótkiego filmu psychologicznego szukamy mistrza oświetlenia z doświadczeniem, który pomoże nam zbudować odpowiedni klimat wizualny. 

Akcja rozgrywa się głównie w starszym mieszkaniu o lekko zaniedbanym, post-PRL-owskim charakterze. Projekt stawia na atmosferę, z dużym naciskiem na światło jako środek narracyjny, dlatego zależy nam na osobie z doświadczeniem.

Estetyka projektu:  

minimalizm • surowość • noc • realizm • intymność • psychologia postaci  

Jest to projekt autorski/niezależny, więc możemy zaoferować stawkę 500 zł za dzień zdjęciowy

📩Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a lub znasz kogoś, kto mógłby być idealny do tej roli - odezwij się na priv lub w komentarzu :)

items.text:
Uwaga!!! Warszawa!!! Gliniarze!!! Pilne!!!

Do najnowszego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

Siwy, Mateusz Siwek (44) – boss narkotykowy, bezwzględny, wzbudza respekt, mściwy, ceni lojalność, ale potrafi kalkulować. Łysy. Może być napakowany, ale nie musi. Musi zagrać groźnego 😉

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
(PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

An upcoming independent student short film casting for the lead role of Catwoman!! Using a special loan granted and sponsored by our film school.

Producer/Director: Maddi Egan (unfortunately our previous director has had to step away due to family commitments)

Role: Catwoman

Gender: Female

Age Range: 18–25

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

**CASTING CALL – STAGED READING (THEATRE)**

**TITLE:** The Stress Fracture

**LOCATION:** Duns, Scotland

**PRODUCTION DATE:** May 4–5, 2026

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid (£150 per day)

**PRODUCER OR PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Tatty Pants Theatre Co.

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q)) for casting details.

Tatty Pants Theatre Co. is casting performers for **“The Stress Fracture”** by Ben Ramsay, a new play heading to **DunsPlayFest** as part of their Play Development Series.

**ROLES**

**RACHEL ZIELINSKI**

Female | Mid 20s

• Trade union representative

• Intelligent, grounded, and strong-willed

**YVONNE WISHART**

Female | 40s

• Retail manager

• Disciplinary investigator

• Authoritative with underlying complexity

**Production Details**

• Rehearsals:

– May 4 (12pm–8pm)

– May 5 (10am–late)

• Staged Reading:

– May 5 at 9:15PM

• Location: Volunteer Hall, Duns

• Open to **Scotland-based actors**

• All experience levels encouraged

**CASTING CALL – STAGED READING (THEATRE)**

**TITLE:** The Stress Fracture

**LOCATION:** Duns, Scotland

**PRODUCTION DATE:** May 4–5, 2026

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid (£150 per day)

**PRODUCER OR PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Tatty Pants Theatre Co.

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q)) for casting details.

Tatty Pants Theatre Co. is casting performers for **“The Stress Fracture”** by Ben Ramsay, a new play heading to **DunsPlayFest** as part of their Play Development Series.

**ROLES**

**RACHEL ZIELINSKI**

Female | Mid 20s

• Trade union representative

• Intelligent, grounded, and strong-willed

**YVONNE WISHART**

Female | 40s

• Retail manager

• Disciplinary investigator

• Authoritative with underlying complexity

**Production Details**

• Rehearsals:

– May 4 (12pm–8pm)

– May 5 (10am–late)

• Staged Reading:

– May 5 at 9:15PM

• Location: Volunteer Hall, Duns

• Open to **Scotland-based actors**

• All experience levels encouraged

**HOW TO APPLY**

Apply via **Actors & Extras** as a Talent PRO member with a **1-month FREE trial**:

[[https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7epADAosI8qvu4HY8uj-DkgNfND5M9LaI-3wvWZfv1gATB9Aj68swCLacPNA_aem_HL8FJEETtK6GFQZQSHrjgA&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw)]([https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factorsandextras.com%2Fcasting-calls%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExVEllRDc3UEZ6RTJsTGN3cnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5AHH3pVIuleEedxSqtBNUmrGderDJDMaNh3F4icyY6Xd8J71oIaLXidwBRQg_aem_6bCgJuJq9-eHX7PnytPA2Q&h=AT7f_gmA2xCAGSl6KZgJDxWLLMKTV5WcF5Y_yEkD6PDWe5dnjBV5T__kUGwxQFKU-MPQgK68DSn2pH7hYut0MTdUgE9HTuXj4_-brY1wU_MG6WfOCNW79FMcS35aEAYyAbhxhh1-e-bCFXg_cdc&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT6SOY8oRhwVxMimuOjDoeS2Rvf3UJhePHQUxnihmKT8CpMvG7TRHFFC9zfeds5LXdWCdDYV-dx5QZYc_n6zFJSpR9v4WzCjbAXk-0kJeIcW0F-91uqkKIp3aN0g6teWPStZIoNZe500WlQb7YHCDBR0_zAo52FuajpUYtm-naTcJ9CKH6vr9etY9sk-xpTdNX3gMmTl4NkufOcJRAVsJbephw))

sharedPost.text:
Wow💥😮 I’m truly amazed by the strength and grace of Shen Yun’s dancers — their legs and arms are pure power in motion!💪🔥 Their control, flexibility, and grace are simply next level.
Here we go! 🌟 ⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Choose your best seat here and make your special day unforgettable:👉 https://1kb.link/vG6zC9

sharedPost.text:
Wow 😮 Amazing talent! ❤️❤️ 😮 The Shen Yun dancers performing under the California sun is so beautiful.
⚡️ Trust me — you'll want to see it live. Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/gSQBne for theater and ticket information

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.text:
The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

Gloria Instagram link below: 

https://www.instagram.com/thegloriamovie?igsh=dm5rYTVvZ3B6ZjBi

Amazon (Buy/Rent):

https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GL251YNY/

Amazon DVD:

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GNW4X3X2/ref=atv_dp_oth_format_dvd_0

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’m currently putting together a proof of concept short film together titled Nevermind, a drama-comedy about two exes who are destined to remain in each other’s lives.

I’m looking to collaborate with:
•⁠  ⁠Director of Photography (DP) — preference for those who have access to their own gear
•⁠  ⁠Assistant Director (AD)

This is a student film, so please note that it’s a low-budget project, but a great opportunity to collaborate on something character-driven and meaningful. Our shooting dates are May 1st to May 3rd. 

If you’re interested (or know someone who might be), please email me at himanginipuri@gmail.com and cc rheadamani@gmail.com with your work/portfolio.

Would love to connect!

CASTING CALL – THE HUNTER (Sci-Fi Short Film)

Seeking a male actor, age 30s–40s, Hispanic or dark-featured Caucasian, athletic build, 5'10" or taller.
Filming Location: Hubert, NC
Shoot Date: Friday, 4/10
Rate: $200/day
This is for a sci-fi short film with a strong cinematic tone. Looking for someone with a solid screen presence and physicality. If interested, please send headshot, resume and demo reel: https://www.10thlegionpictures.com/actor-submission

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Mer Sunshine.

The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May

Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are looking for drivers with cars only .

We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Casting Call:  🎬 PAID ON-SCREEN TALENT NEEDED – BIRMINGHAM

We’re looking for confident on-screen talent to feature in short video content for a small solicitors firm.

📍 Filming in and around Birmingham
💷 £50 flat fee (approx. 4 hours)

You’ll be performing a mix of roles — including client-style scenarios, informational content, and some lighter, more engaging videos.

We’re looking for someone who:

Is natural and confident on camera
Can deliver lines clearly and convincingly
Is reliable and easy to work with

🎭 Showreel required

⭐ Potential for ongoing paid work for the right person

📩 Comment below or DM with your showreel + headshot

topComments.text: As you were told when you posted this elsewhere, you don't pay minimum wage to film an advert for businesses charging high prices. And seeking someone who has to pay to get to Birmingham means finding someone who will be working for nothing.
Available with experience, but you’d have to do something about the money to make it worth it ￼

items.text:
Hello

We’re excited to invite you to take part in a series of FREE Clown School Workshops in Southport. 🤡✨

Led by Southport’s leading clown teacher, Richard Talbot, these workshops offer accessible, high-quality training for anyone interested in clowning, physical theatre, or playful performance. Whether you’re an experienced performer or a complete beginner, you’re welcome to join us and discover the joy of clowning.

📝 Register here:
https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=QCm1Zbb0vUGDPTAz7Lz24d2w3fa3dwhFpe8ffYp4uXxURDBDRjc3VkZYTTE0STVIRzVZMDQ0OEZBMy4u&route=shorturl

If you have any questions please contact me at gina@newheritageperformance.com

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?
I’m a producer working with Muse, a leading television production company currently developing a premium documentary film for a major network.

We’re seeking individuals (18+) based in the U.S. or Canada who are open to sharing their personal experiences with AI chatbots as part of the upcoming documentary. **Have AI chatbots had a negative impact on your life, relationships, mental health, or career?** Have you ever felt misled, overly validated, or even disconnected from reality through interactions with them? **Did you experience paranormal activity through a chatbot?**

If so, please get in touch to learn more! (for those who have applied already, you are still being considered, thanks!). Please reach out via email to **casting@muse.ca** with a brief description of your experience. 

Note: ***This casting call is NOT permitted to be shared on external sites without prior consent.***

Seeking actress age 18-23, for the role of a 15/16 year old closeted/pre-transition trans guy. I’ve had no luck with finding a trans actor, so this is my last resort. An androgynous/masculine look is preferred, but not required.

Saturday, April 11th from 12:50PM-6:00PM
Sunday, April 12th from 10:45AM-5:30PM

Location:
Saturday- Lowry Studios
Sunday- Aurora Highlands

This is a student short, so unfortunately it is unpaid, but you will receive a copy of the film when it’s finished.

Food/drinks will be provided both days. 

Please feel free to message me on here or over email at dominic.dhorton99@gmail.com

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m 

@samantha_oactor 

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories

#offiesawards

#fringetheatre

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.  

#ForeverEntertainment #CrowdfundDreams #LightsCameraAction #AmericanProduction #CollaborateAndCreate 
#BeTheChange 
#ShineTogether 
#FilmCommunity 
#SupportTheArts 
#YourNameInLights

items.text:
Spürst du das Kribbeln? Genau das ist dein Moment.  

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 steht in den Startlöchern und schon jetzt zeigt sich: Diese Staffel wird größer, wilder und spannender als je zuvor! 🚀  

Denn viele starke Talente haben sich bereits beworben… und trotzdem fehlt noch DU!  

💥 Stell dir vor:  
Licht an. Musik startet. Das Publikum schaut nur auf dich.  

Und du zeigst endlich, was in dir steckt.  

🎤 Ganz egal, was dein Talent ist:  
Ob du singst, tanzt, performst, Menschen zum Lachen bringst oder etwas komplett Einzigartiges kannst diese Bühne gehört dir!  

🌟 Was dich erwartet:  
• Eine echte Bühne mit Live-Publikum  
• Gänsehaut-Momente & pure Emotion  
• Eine Show voller Energie und Überraschungen  
• Die Chance, entdeckt zu werden  

⚡ Und das Beste:  
Schon jetzt ist klar – die Konkurrenz ist stark, die Acts sind vielfältig und das Niveau steigt.  

👉 Es wird ein Wettbewerb, den man nicht verpassen darf!  

🚀 Jetzt liegt es an dir:  
Willst du nur zuschauen… oder selbst auf der Bühne stehen?  

📅 Jury Castings: Mai, Juni & Juli 2026  

📝 Bewirb dich jetzt:  
👉 https://electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html  

🔥 Trau dich. Zeig dein Talent. Verändere deinen Moment.  

#evctalentcastingshow #casting2026 #jetztbewerben #talentshow #kleve #showtime #traudich

items.text:
Casting Call for Blackburn College film project (6-minute post-apocalyptic, rom-com short film) 'Big Mistake'
I will be casting for the characters of Mallory (18-30 year old female) and Sam (18-30 year old male) please let me know if there would be anyone interested.

Synopsis: Sam and Mal fall in love surviving chaos together. But moving in together turns their romance into a nonstop, absurd battle of bickering, with fights escalating over everything. So, when a zombie crashes through their front door, will they finally team up, or keep fighting each other?

Filming would take place in Blackburn around Griffin Park for 2/3 days between the 15th and the 26th of April! Please message for more info if you are interested in the role and I can share more about the characters and script.

This project is a college film so is non-profit, although we can discuss covering costs for transportation if needed.

topComments.text: This is most certainly not a casting call, zero information

items.text:
WARSZAWA 8.04.2026r.
film fabularny 

Szukam dublera:

- Mężczyzna ok. 35-50 lat, średniego wzrostu (ok. 1,7m) z wysportowaną sylwetką. Ponadto brunet, lekko wpadający w rudy. Mile widziany zarost.

STAWKA 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: DUBLER 

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.title: AUTHENTIC.

items.text:
I’m looking for 2-3 charismatic creators with professional experience to create content for my marketing agency. I’m a fairly new, small agency. I’m an expert behind the scenes, but I don't have an "on-camera" personality—which is where you come in! I want to give the agency a personable,  human feel by featuring a few different experts.

Must have access to a clean, modern office or home-office background.

Experience: Seeking people who have experience working in professional/office environments so the "expert" persona feels natural.

Content: Trendy Reels/TikTok, IG, and Facebook, marketing tips, and "POV" office clips (30 secs to 1 minute clips)

Pay: $100 per video we do

Rights: As an agency, we will own the full rights to the content (Work for Hire) for use across social channels.

If you’re interested please reach out to me via messenger or you can email Ericlewinsky@gmail.com . Please put content creator in the subject line so I can avoid getting spams and bots. Please don’t comment under the post because I will be posting this in multiple groups and it’s hard to keep up with all the notifications.

items.text:
Filmmakers this one is free.

The American Film Association is hosting a Film Packaging Workshop in Atlanta and 100 seats are free.

You will walk away knowing how to build a real film package, attach talent and financing, position your project for distribution, and think like a producer not just a filmmaker.

General Admission: FREE

VIP Dinner with speakers: $150 (only 10 VIP seats available)

If you are serious about getting your project made this is the room to be in.

Grab your free seat:

items.text:
🌷 It's almost a new term already, so we thought we'd introduce ourselves as we recently joined this group! 👋🏼

We're Josh & Aimee, a husband and wife team who both happened to be home educated growing up!
We now run Swan Tutoring - engaging online classes for home educating families! We have a lovely small team of wonderful teachers, and we offer the following subjects...

English 📚 Maths 🧮 Science 🧬 History 🏛️ Geography 🌎 World Explorers ✈️  Social Studies 🪭 Psychology 🧠 Health & Nutrition 🍎 Life Skills 🌱 Spanish 🇪🇸 French 🇫🇷 British Sign Language 🤟 Piano 🎹 Art 🎨 Phonics 🔤 Reception Class 👧🏽 GCSE classes 🎓

We have spaces available for the upcoming term, so let us know if you'd like more information! 😊

items.text: Join NANI in LA on April 9 & 18!

sharedPost.text:
Since April is my birthday month, celebrate with NANI and me by coming to these screenings in Los Angeles!! Yes!!!

1.NANI 
At the Pasadena Film festival
April 9, 1:30 pm, 
Noho 7 Laemmle Theatre    

 2. NANI 
At the Hollywood Blvd Film Festival 
April 18, 2:15, Let Live Cinema
(This may be NANI’s last day of her global festival run) 

@hbfilmfestival @pasadenafilmfestival @nirv4321 @b.khanfident @roomeen8 @moinky @nanishortfilm @sunita.s.mukhi @highlight

sharedPost.text:
🎭✨ BIG NEWS ✨🎭

We’re so excited to announce our brand NEW Transition Year programme in partnership with Ashfield College!

Now you can combine top-class academic learning with professional Musical Theatre training.  The perfect balance of education and creativity with both studio and real, in school academic excellence  💫

🎶 Train in singing, acting & dance
📚 Achieve excellence in your academic studies preparing you for Leaving Cert and beyond 
🌟 Build confidence, skills & lifelong friendships

If you’ve ever dreamed of performing while staying on track academically, this is YOUR moment.

🎟️ Limited places available so don’t miss out! Open day and Registration info coming soon. 

#transitionyear #musicaltheatre #performingarts #tyireland #fulltime

🎬 **CASTING CALL – TOURING MUSICAL “BRING ME SUNSHINE”**

**TITLE:** Bring Me Sunshine
**LOCATION:** UK-wide (Touring)
**PRODUCTION DATE:** Rehearsals May 25–29 | Tour June 1 – July 31, 2026
**PAID:** £700/week + fuel + accommodation allowance
**PRODUCER:** The Entertainment Providers
**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls)

A **UK touring summer musical** is casting a **solo performer** to lead a high-energy show featuring classics like *La Bamba*, *Viva España*, *Come Fly With Me* and more.

🎭 **ROLE**

**PERFORMER (Solo Show)**
Male or Female | Experienced Vocalist

• Strong vocals + engaging stage presence
• Confident performing solo (one-person show)
• Energetic, charismatic, adaptable
• Passion for live/community performance

🎥 **DETAILS**

• Touring Monday–Friday across the UK
• 2 x 60-minute shows per day
• Must be a **driver with own car**
• Open UK-wide (include location when applying)

💼 **PAY**

• £700 per week
• Fuel covered
• Accommodation allowance provided

📩 **APPLY**

Apply via Actors & Extras (Talent PRO – 1-month FREE trial):
➡️ [https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls)

Know someone perfect for this? Tag or share 👇

🔍 *This casting has been shared by Actors and Extras as a service to our talent directory members. We have received permission to share it and believe it to be legitimate. However, we strongly encourage all applicants to exercise due diligence and independently verify the details of the project before proceeding.*

items.text:
HERE’S WHY EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT ‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ THE PLAY RIGHT NOW…
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m 

@samantha_oactor 

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories 

#dramaticplay

#mustsee

#londontheatre

#actors

#whatsoninlondon

items.text:
**Authentic Character Portraits | Eastbourne & Sussex 📸**

I'm a Sussex-based photographer moving away from "perfect" studio filters to focus on **honest, high-definition headshots** for actors and models.

My goal is to capture your 'casting type' exactly as you are—focusing on active eyes and real textures that meet **Spotlight standards**. No heavy airbrushing, just great light and genuine connection.

**What I’m offering:**
* Studio & Cinematic Street sessions in Eastbourne.
* A relaxed environment to get those "blank canvas" looks agents love.
* Quick turnaround for 2026 pilot season/graduates.

I’m looking for **3 more faces** this month to build out this authentic style for my portfolio. I'm offering a significantly reduced rate for these sessions.

**Comment 'INFO' below or DM me to grab one of the 3 spots!**

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — AS THE LIGHT FADES

RDE Films is casting for a psychological crime thriller shooting this June in Colorado.

We’re looking for grounded actors who can live truthfully in heavy, character-driven material.

⸻

ROLES:

[YOUNG PROTAGONIST]
Black Male | 14–18
Quiet. Observant. Carrying more than he should.
Must be able to deliver a strong emotional scene.

⸻

[FATHER FIGURE]
Black Male | 40–60
Strong presence. Controlled. A man of few words.

⸻

[SOUTHERN LOCAL]
Caucasian Male | 30–40
Heavy Southern accent. Blue-collar. Brief physical altercation.

⸻

Send: Headshot, Resume, Reel (if available)
📩 Casting@Rdefilms.com
Subject: ROLE – NAME

Local hires preferred.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am shooting a student film this Friday April 10th and had 2 of my main actors bail. I am looking for 2 male actors, age 18-24. The film is called “X Marks the Pot” and this is the logline: A group of broke friends follow a map to a secret high-stakes poker game, only to be outplayed by an inexperienced kid with nothing to lose.  

If you can help me out please message me immediately or reply on this post! Thank you!

topComments.text: If you’d be open to gender-swapping one of the roles, I’d love to be considered! I’m local and available Friday 😊
I have 2 male actors for you. Do you still need actors?

items.text:
Pacific Producers Group & Vancouver Virtual Productions are casting for a 30-second and 15-second TV commercial to be filmed on April 16th in Coquitlam.

**3-4 Year Old Girl (female, 3-5 years old, Caucasian)**
* Positive, energetic, excitable, a winning smile
* Her character is wearing a full bathing suit, wrapped up in a towel over top, and is putting one foot in and out of a small kid-sized inflatable pool in the summer.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* Compensation: 1x30-sec ad - $750, agency fee included.
* Rights & Terms: a complete buyout for all media in perpetuity
* This is a non-union shoot (no royalties/residuals) and shooting will require a day of the talent’s time – we estimate a 2 to 4 hour day for talent
* Character has no dialogue
* We will be focused on naturalness, energy, and connection to other characters (mom)
* Lunch/food will be provided
* Filming will be indoors, in a studio
* The TV ad is for an outdoor living product, and the script is family-oriented
* Talent will provide their own basic wardrobe, but some character-specific wardrobe items may be supplied by production
* A wardrobe allowance will be added for any personal items used ($25 for basic wardrobe outfit, plus $5 for each additional item)

**AUDITION MATERIAL**

If interested, please email a headshot and resume to duramarket@duradek.com .

You’re also welcome to submit any web links to an online reel, demo, or portfolio of past work. However, we are specifically seeking audition material; these can be self-filmed on a phone or iPhone – with the following requested audition material:

We’d love to see this young actress in playful situations – skipping

rope or playing hopscotch or balancing on one leg, enjoying themselves and laughing.

🎬 CASTING DO FILMU FABULARNEGO

Poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do głównych ról w nowym, poruszającym dramacie wojennym.

📍 Terminy castingu (na żywo):

– Warszawa – 18 kwietnia

– Wrocław – 2 maja

– Gdańsk – 7 maja

🎭 Poszukiwane role:

DZIEWCZYNA (15–20 lat) – rola główna

Wrażliwa, inteligentna, naturalna. Rola wymagająca dużej autentyczności i głębi emocjonalnej.

MATKA (35–45 lat)

Ciepła, silna, oddana rodzinie. Postać pełna emocji i wewnętrznej siły.

OJCIEC (40–50 lat)

Spokojny, odpowiedzialny, obecność sceniczna, subtelna gra emocji.

MŁODSZA SIOSTRA (8–12 lat)

Naturalna, ekspresyjna, emocjonalna relacja z główną bohaterką.

🎥 Doświadczenie mile widziane, ale nie jest wymagane – najważniejsze są naturalność i autentyczność.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

**juliarokietek@gmail.com**

W wiadomości prosimy podać:

– imię i wiek

– miasto zamieszkania

– aktualne zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)

– krótką informację o sobie / doświadczeniu

Wybrane osoby zaprosimy na casting stacjonarny.

Zapraszamy! 🎭

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

items.summary:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow https://www.starnow.com/casting_director/applicants/production/3141318/

Hi everyone! We’re casting for the role of *Matt* in a student film.

We’re looking for a male actor in their late 20s to early 30s (playing age). The role is paid at £120 per day (£240 total), travel costs total £30 (for the two days) and includes a kissing scene.

Please note: we’re only considering London-based actors.

🎤🔥 ARTIST CALL: LIVE TALENT SHOWCASE 🔥🎤

📍 The Colonnade • Ringgold, GA — just outside Chattanooga

Georgia Country Summer Festival 2026 is looking for new talent.

Hosted by Xtreme Dreams Foundation and curated by Family Wealth Moguls, this official talent showcase gives artists the opportunity to take the stage, compete for cash prizes, and be considered for the chance to open for Tae Lewis from The Voice.

We’re looking for:
🎤 Solo Artists
🔥 Groups
💥 Youth Acts

💰 Top 3 artists will win cash prizes 
⭐ Selected artists may have the opportunity to open for Tae Lewis 
⏳ Limited performance slots available

If you’re ready to be seen, heard, and take your talent to the next level, this is your moment.

Submit performance clips and original tracks to:
📩 FamilyWealthMoguls@gmail.com

Serious artists only.

#GACountrySummerFestival #TalentShowcase #ArtistCall #xtremedreamsfoundation #FamilyWealthMoguls

There’s a **live online trial acting class on Zoom** where you can actually participate, not just watch. The best part is that It’s kept small (around 16–18 people), so it’s not crowded and you get real individual feedback and attention.

It’s a really solid way to experience what a professional class feels like before committing to anything long-term.

If you want to try it out, just comment below or DM me and I’ll send you the details 👍

If you're interested in working together, feel free to leave a comment. I can also be reached via DMs or my email bosco.marielle@gmail.com. I look forward to collaborating!

I have also made a discount code for 35% that will be good for a limited time. When booking on my site, enter CALI35 

My Booking Site: https://visualcosmos.square.site

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mariellebosco/

If you're interested in working together, feel free to leave a comment. I can also be reached via DMs or my email bosco.marielle@gmail.com. I look forward to collaborating!

UNPAID - OPEN CASTING CALL

Shoot: Saturday 4/11 (9am-7pm) Hollywood, CA

We're looking for 3-4 actors and some crew that want to participate in a 48hr Film Festival project. Encouraging all applicants.

For crew, we need a Gaffer and a Colorist. Colorist could just pop in a couple hours Sunday morning (coffee provided) and help touch up after we edit overnight. Feel free to reach out with questions, I'm the DP/Producer. 

(*The rules for 48hr Film Festival is "all cast and crew are volunteers" so everyone is pulling a favor on the crew. Copy, credit, meal provided.)*

sharedPost.text:
NOW CASTING FOR A NEWBORN TO 1-YR-OLD HISPANIC BABY FOR A HEALTHCARE COMMERCIAL!

***PLEASE NOTE NEW FILMING WINDOW***

Angela Boehm Casting is looking for a Hispanic baby for a Healthcare Commercial that will be filming in the NE Ohio area from April 22nd - 28th, 2026.

If you have already auditioned, no need to resubmit. We already have your audition 🙂 

*Please see below for more details*

DETAILS:

Project: Healthcare Commercial 

Usage: Local/regional healthcare 
TV, Social and Web 
VIDEO Use ONLY - NO Digital Stills or Print use

Filming Location: NE Ohio Area

Shoot Dates: April 22nd - 28th 2026 ***PLEASE NOTE NEW FILMING WINDOW***

Pay Rate: USAGE Plus 1 Shoot Day (Up to 8 hrs Only) 
Child (12 + Under) $1250 + 20% A. Fee
1 year buyout and usage fee renewable

Submission & Selections: Video submission. A current photo and full body also needed. We do not need to see photos in advance, just include them with the video.

Submission Deadline: ASAP; Thursday, April 9th 9:00am

Roles & Creative Specs:

Slate instructions: Name, Agent (or phone if you’re not with an agent), Age, and any conflicts with filming dates (note: it is ideal to have none :)). Please state if you are a real family auditioning (as well as state the family member’s names and the role they are auditioning for). 

Audition Directions:
Please do not tape outside
Please have a blank background
Please put slates at the end of the audition.
Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

BABY: Newborn - 1 yr old (Hispanic, Any gender) A young mother, sits up in bed with her young baby. A 1-year-old. The baby cries. (Which we can do with sound effects from the reverse view without needing to have the actual baby crying). Her husband sits next to them and tries to comfort her. Home environment description: A modest home. A starter home. Maybe even an apartment feel. This is a younger family who’s starting out. Please do one take and have the child do the action alone. For a second take you can be in the audition to help your child with the action if you’re willing to be in the commercial with her if chosen.

*When auditioning - less is MORE!

All submissions must be emailed to angela@angelaboehmcasting.com with subject line "HISPANIC BABY" ASAP or by Thursday, April 9th at 9:00AM. Please no YouTube links.  Send submissions via WeTransfer or Dropbox.   

Please share with anyone who may fit the specs, as this is a difficult find. Thank you in advance! :)

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team

Hejka!

Szukam młodej osoby do udziału w krótkometrażowym filmie dyplomowym (ASP). 

Projekt opiera się na ekspresji ruchu i mimiki — sceny są bezdialogowe, nastawione na emocje i obraz.

Zdjęcia planowane są w okolicach **Wałbrzycha / Wrocławia**

Termin: w ciągu najbliższych dwóch tygodni (dokładna data do ustalenia)

Czas trwania: 1–2 dni zdjęciowe
Projekt non-profit 

Chętnych proszę o napisanie do mnie wiadomości prywatnej!

Będę również wdzięczna za udostępnienia!

items.text:
🎬 SZUKAMY TWARZY DO FILMU DYPLOMOWEGO

Do krótkiego filmu dyplomowego poszukujemy aktorów do głównych ról:

👦 Chłopiec (5–10 lat)
– brązowe włosy, brązowe oczy
– jasna skóra
– brak widocznych znamion na twarzy i dłoniach

👨 Mężczyzna (ok. 30 lat)
– wzrost ok. 180 cm
– brązowe włosy, brązowe oczy
– jasna skóra
– brak widocznych znamion na twarzy i dłoniach

👨‍🦳 Mężczyzna (ok. 55 lat)
– wzrost ok. 180 cm
– brązowe włosy, brązowe oczy
– jasna skóra
– brak widocznych znamion na twarzy i dłoniach

👴 Mężczyzna (70+ lub wyglądający na starszego)
– siwe włosy, brązowe oczy
– wzrost ok. 170–180 cm
– brak widocznych znamion na twarzy i dłoniach

📍 Warszawa
📅 Terminy zdjęć:
– 18–19 kwietnia
lub
– 10, 11, 13 maja

🎓 Projekt realizowany w ramach pracy dyplomowej (non profit).
🎥 Gwarantujemy miłą atmosferę na planie i materiały do portfolio.

📩 Zgłoszenia
W zgłoszeniu wyślij:
– imię i nazwisko
– wiek
– aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)
– doświadczenie (jeśli jest)

❗ Zastrzegamy sobie prawo do kontaktu tylko z wybranymi osobami.

✨ Udostępnij dalej — może ktoś czeka właśnie na taką szansę!

topComments.text: Witam Adam Tymosiak Warszawa jestem zainteresowany ofertą współpracy,60 lat, tylko oczy niebieskie
